name: Chef Dennis's Albondigas Soup
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is from the mystery "The 27 Ingredient Chili Con Carne Murders" by Nancy Pickard and Virginia Rich.
1. In a mixing bowl, mix ground beef with garlic powder, cumin, oregano, and cilantro. Shape into 1-oz meatballs.
2. In a large pot, melt butter over medium heat. Add diced tomatoes, green chilies, chopped garlic, onions, chopped cabbage, finely diced zucchini, and chopped cilantro. Sauté until vegetables are tender.
3. Pour in beef broth. Stir to combine with the sautéed vegetables.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then add the meatballs one at a time, stirring gently to prevent them from breaking.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Remove from heat and garnish with chopped cilantro just before serving.
Note: This soup is even better the next day as the flavors have more time to meld together.
